# Weybridge Lodge

> Weybridge Lodge No. 6787 is a Masonic lodge meeting in Guildford, Surrey. We welcome men of all backgrounds who seek fellowship, personal development, and charitable engagement.

Weybridge Lodge was consecrated in 1949 and operates under the United Grand Lodge of England. The lodge meets regularly at the Surrey Masonic Centre and supports local and national charities including the Surrey 2030 Festival, SANDS, and the Brigitte Trust.

## Pages

- [/](/): Homepage — upcoming events, latest news, and an introduction to the lodge.
- [What is Freemasonry](/what-is-freemasonry): An introduction to Freemasonry, its values, and what it means to be a Freemason.
- [Join Us](/join-us): Information on how to become a Freemason and the membership process at Weybridge Lodge.
- [Lodge Profile](/lodge-profile): Overview of Weybridge Lodge No. 6787, its history, and its place in the Province of Surrey.
- [History](/history): A detailed history of Weybridge Lodge from its consecration in 1949 to the present day.
- [Worshipful Masters](/worshipful-masters): Roll of Worshipful Masters who have led the lodge since 1949.
- [Officers](/officers): Current lodge officers and their roles.
- [Officers' Jewels](/officers-jewels): Guide to the jewels worn by Masonic officers and their symbolism.
- [Freemasonry and Charity](/freemasonry-and-charity): How Freemasonry supports charitable causes at local and national levels.
- [Our Charities](/our-charities): The charities supported by Weybridge Lodge, including Surrey 2030, SANDS, and the Brigitte Trust.
- [Events](/events): Upcoming lodge { ceremonies, social events, and lodge meetings.
- [Ladies' Festival](/ladies-festival): Annual Ladies' Festival gala dinner and celebration.
- [Bookings](/bookings): Event and festive board booking information.
- [News](/news): Latest news, articles, and updates from Weybridge Lodge.
- [Video Hub](/video-hub): Videos about Freemasonry, lodge events, and member experiences.
- [Masonic Links](/masonic-links): Links to United Grand Lodge of England, Provincial Grand Lodge of Surrey, and other Masonic organisations.
- [FAQ](/faq): Frequently asked questions about Freemasonry and joining the lodge.
- [Contact](/contact): How to get in touch with Weybridge Lodge.
- [First Visit](/first-visit): What to expect on your first visit to a lodge meeting.
- [Your Initiation](/your-initiation): What happens during a Masonic initiation ceremony.
- [Your Journey](/your-journey): The progression through the three degrees of Craft Freemasonry.
- [Lodge Traditions](/lodge-traditions): Customs and traditions observed at Weybridge Lodge.
- [Data Protection](/data-protection): Privacy policy and data protection information.

- [News — 75th Anniversary](/news/75th-anniversary): Celebrating 75 years of Weybridge Lodge.
